library.title: Library
library.lead: Open, read, annotate. Research on a wide screen.
library.empty: No books published yet. LDE arrives in the next build step.
library.footerNote: Notes via Hypothes.is · research links on desktop only
viewport.limitedBody: This library is designed for a wide screen: annotate, read, and consult side by side. On this device you get the book and notes only — no research links.
